title: 有馬記念の後に・からっぽ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan ekes out a victory in the Arima
Kinen with every fiber of her being.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals quickly begin discussing areas they
need to improve in. They seem completely alien
to Jordan, who's too exhausted to even think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing anyone says makes sense. It's like they're
from another planet, speaking another language.
It terrifies her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's convinced that her win was pure luck, and
that she'll only lose from here on, because she's a
dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not in the mood to think about what's next.
My suggestion to aim for the Osaka Hai falls on
deaf ears.
